title: Richly Roasted British Monkfish Shepherds Pie
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring monkfish in a dairy-free shepherds pie, with a richly roasted flavor from fermented ingredients and a molten top. This dish is perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the monkfish and cook until it is opaque and flakes easily with a fork.
Stir in the tomato paste and vegetable broth, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture cook while preparing the mashed potatoes.
Spread the mashed potatoes over the top of the fish mixture and sprinkle with nutritional yeast.
Transfer the dish to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
